metadata.role_title: SDE II / SDE III - GenAI / ML Engineer
metadata.match_reason: Flagship GenAI assistant Flippi (LLM+RAG+NER+Query Reformulation, arXiv 2507.05788);  explicitly looks for Python + RAG + prompt engineering at SDE II level (1+ yr Python ML libs).
metadata.notes: Top ML team in Indian e-commerce; Mayur Datar leads.  Multimodal search, seller GenAI,  Triksha security. Strong RAG/LLM cold-email fit.

research_summary: Flipkart's GenAI team published the Flippi paper (arXiv 2507.05788) covering LLM+RAG+NER+query reformulation for shopping -- strong technical match with Amit's retrieval work. SDE II Gen AI role sits in Consumer Shopping Experiences, requiring Python, RAG, prompt engineering, LLM APIs. Email pattern is firstname.lastname@flipkart.com. Targeting 3 tech recruiters since cold outreach to EMs at this scale rarely lands; TA team was recently recognized as AI Pioneer at LinkedIn Talent Awards.
jd_full_text:
Software Development Engineer II, Gen AI -- Flipkart (Consumer Shopping Experiences, Bengaluru)

Responsibilities:
- Work closely with leadership and stakeholders to identify AI opportunities and develop strategies for integrating GenAI technologies into Flipkart's business operations
- Collaborate with cross-organizational teams to integrate GenAI-driven solutions into existing applications
- Implement Gen AI paradigms such as prompt engineering and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Deliver solutions following modern software development practices, including Agile methodologies, test-driven development (TDD), and scalable architecture design
- Mentor and guide team members in understanding and applying large language models effectively, fostering a culture of innovation and continuous learning

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in computer science, IT, AI, or a relevant discipline
- Proficiency (1+ years) in Python and related AI/ML libraries
- Good understanding of Gen AI paradigms such as Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture and prompt engineering techniques
- Experience with API-based integrations and cloud deployment (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP)

Nice to have:
- Hands-on experience with Generative AI tech: OpenAI / Gemini models or other open source LLMs and large vision/multimedia models
- Experience with deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or equivalent
- Experience in one or more of the following domains: search, recommender systems, NLP/text summarization, computer vision / visual search, conversational assistants
tailoring_notes:
1. SUMMARY: Changed 'GenAI' to 'Generative AI (GenAI)' and 'Retrieval-Augmented Generation' spelled out -- ATS exact-string matching. Removed 'edge ML' mention (irrelevant to LLM-infra role). Added 'prompt engineering' and 'vector databases' as explicit keywords mirroring JD requirements.
2. SECTION ORDER: Moved Technical Skills BEFORE Work Experience -- ATS systems front-load keyword matching on the skills section; this ensures RAG, Prompt Engineering, NLP, Python register early in the parse.
3. SKILLS REORDER: 'Techniques' (RAG, Prompt Engineering, NLP, Semantic Search) moved to second bullet, immediately after Python. Added 'Semantic Search' and 'Text Summarization' (both in JD nice-to-haves). 'Infrastructure and Cloud' renamed and added GCP + Microsoft Azure explicitly. Removed Hardware/IoT bullet entirely. Added LangGraph to AI/ML Frameworks.
4. VIVANSH BULLETS (5 -> 4): Bullet 1: added 'conversational assistant' (JD mentions conversational assistants). Bullet 2: added 'prompt engineering for query rewriting' so keyword appears in experience context. Bullet 3: merged form-builder outcome + Pydantic/multi-model detail; added 'Generative AI pipeline' phrase. Bullet 4: added 'semantic search' to video retrieval description.
5. SILVER TOUCH: Added 'Generative AI' to bullet 1. Added 'semantic search' to bullet 2. Added 'NLP-based' to latency bullet. Shortened OCR bullet label (removed full OCR acronym expansion).
6. IIT DELHI: Trimmed to 2 bullets; added 'deep learning model' phrasing for keyword clarity.
7. CERTIFICATIONS: Added Samsung Top 10 achievement (previously only in Projects section which was removed). Added 'Generative AI, NLP, and knowledge mining' to Azure cert description to mirror JD language.
8. ATS RATIONALE: JD keywords now appear at least twice each -- RAG (summary + skills + 3 bullets), Prompt Engineering (summary + skills + bullet), Python (skills), Generative AI (summary + skills + 2 bullets), NLP (skills + bullet), AWS/Azure (summary + skills + bullets), Semantic Search (skills + bullet), Conversational (chatbot bullet).

contacts.research_hook: Focuses specifically on tech hiring at Flipkart; part of the TA team named AI Pioneer at LinkedIn Talent Awards 2026. Flippi RAG paper (arXiv 2507.05788) directly relevant to Amit's retrieval work.
contacts.subject: AI/ML engineer, 2 yrs production RAG, Azure AI cert
contacts.content:
Hi Deepa,

Noticed your team was named AI Pioneer finalist at the LinkedIn Talent Awards. Good recognition for the group.

Reaching out about the SDE II Gen AI opening. Quick background: 2+ years in production AI at Vivansh Infotech. RAG chatbots at 95% MRR and 50K queries per month, on-prem OCR pipelines for sensitive docs, multi-model orchestration across GPT-4o, Qwen, and Gemini. Azure AI Engineer Associate certified. Research stint at IIT Delhi before that.

Read the Flippi arXiv paper (2507.05788). The 2-stage RAG with NER and query reformulation is close to retrieval work I did from scratch at Vivansh. The e-commerce context specifically is what drew me to this role.

Resume and projects: amitgohel.dev

If the role is still open and this sounds like a fit, happy to do a quick screen whenever works.

Amit
contacts.follow_up_1_subject: re: AI/ML engineer, 2 yrs production RAG, Azure AI cert
contacts.follow_up_1_content:
Hi Deepa,

One thing I should have added: last week I ran a comparison of BGE-M3 vs. text-embedding-3-large on an e-commerce product query set. The recall gap at k=10 was bigger than most public benchmarks suggest. Happy to share the numbers if that adds useful context for evaluating fit.

If timing isn't right, no problem.

Amit
contacts.follow_up_2_subject: re: AI/ML engineer, 2 yrs production RAG, Azure AI cert
contacts.follow_up_2_content:
Hi Deepa,

Last note from me. If the Gen AI headcount is full or timing is off, totally understood. Would just appreciate being on your radar for future openings.

Amit
contacts.response_notes: Email permutations to try if bounced: deepa.rani@flipkart.com (current, most likely ~70%), deeparani@flipkart.com, d.rani@flipkart.com, drani@flipkart.com

contacts.research_hook: Explicitly hiring for SDE2, SDE3, Architect, and Engineering Manager roles at Flipkart per her LinkedIn activity.
contacts.subject: AI/ML engineer, 2 yrs production RAG, open to SDE II Gen AI
contacts.content:
Hi Anamika,

Saw you've been posting about SDE2 and SDE3 openings at Flipkart. The Gen AI role looks like a direct match, so reaching out.

Two years shipping production AI at Vivansh Infotech: RAG chatbots at 95% MRR and 50K queries per month, on-prem OCR for sensitive documents, multi-model pipelines with GPT-4o, Qwen, and Gemini. Azure AI Engineer Associate certified. Research at IIT Delhi before that.

The RAG and prompt engineering focus in the JD is the core of what I've been building, not adjacent to it.

Resume and projects: amitgohel.dev

Should I apply through the portal, or is there a better first step?

Amit
contacts.follow_up_1_subject: re: AI/ML engineer, 2 yrs production RAG, open to SDE II Gen AI
contacts.follow_up_1_content:
Hi Anamika,

Quick addition to my last note: I also built multi-tenant permission-aware RAG, where the retrieval index is scoped per seller or user group. In an e-commerce context with seller-level data isolation, that architecture difference matters more than most generic RAG benchmarks show.

Happy to talk through it if useful.

Amit
contacts.follow_up_2_subject: re: AI/ML engineer, 2 yrs production RAG, open to SDE II Gen AI
contacts.follow_up_2_content:
Hi Anamika,

Last one from me. If the role is filled or timing is off, no worries. Would be glad to stay on your radar for future Gen AI openings at Flipkart.

Amit
contacts.response_notes: Email permutations to try if bounced: anamika.chatterjee@flipkart.com (current, most likely ~70%), anamikachatterjee@flipkart.com, a.chatterjee@flipkart.com, achatterjee@flipkart.com
